touches.ai_summary: Inbound request received from Savannah Chen expressing interest in onboarding automation solutions. Initial contact logged.
Brief qualification call with Savannah Chen to understand initial pain points around customer onboarding. VectorAnalytics currently uses manual processes causing delays.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your interest in onboarding automation right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling fast and our manual onboarding is creating bottlenecks. Customer time-to-value is suffering.

questions_asked.question: Do you work with mid-market SaaS companies like us?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have several clients in your segment with similar employee counts.

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call diving into VectorAnalytics' onboarding workflow, team structure, and success metrics. Savannah mentioned they're evaluating Clari as well.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current onboarding process from contract signature to product adoption.
questions_asked.answer: It's very manual - lots of spreadsheets, email threads. Takes 6-8 weeks on average when it should be 3-4.

questions_asked.question: Who else is involved in this evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Our COO Madison Rodriguez will need to sign off, and Emma Morgan from RevOps will do technical evaluation.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from Clari?
questions_asked.answer: We focus specifically on CS automation workflows while Clari is broader revenue operations. Our workflows are more customizable for onboarding.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader use cases
Send case study on onboarding automation

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call mapping out VectorAnalytics' tech stack, integration requirements, and success criteria. Discussed team size needs (27 seats across CS and RevOps).

questions_asked.question: What systems would we need to integrate with?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce, Gainsight, Slack, and our internal data warehouse.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for you in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Cut onboarding time in half, reduce manual touchpoints by 70%, and improve customer NPS scores.

questions_asked.question: What level of consulting support comes with the platform?
questions_asked.answer: We offer tiered packages - sounds like you'd benefit from our automations plus consulting tier for workflow design.

next_steps: Prepare custom demo focused on onboarding workflows

touches.ai_summary: Quick follow-up call to clarify seat count and user roles. Confirmed 27 seats needed across CS managers, CS ops, and RevOps team.

questions_asked.question: Can you break down the 27 seats by role and use case?
questions_asked.answer: 15 CS managers running onboarding, 8 CS ops for analytics, 4 RevOps for process design.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call addressing security questions and compliance requirements. Savannah confirmed VectorAnalytics needs SOC 2 compliance for enterprise customers.

questions_asked.question: Are you SOC 2 Type II certified?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we achieved certification last year and can share our report under NDA.

questions_asked.question: Any other compliance or security requirements we should know about?
questions_asked.answer: GDPR compliance for our European customers, but that's standard.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with SOC 2 documentation, demo agenda, and calendar invite including Savannah and Emma Morgan for technical evaluation.
Call to prep for upcoming demo. Discussed specific onboarding workflows to showcase and Emma's technical evaluation criteria.

questions_asked.question: What technical aspects will Emma be evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: API reliability, data model flexibility, and how well it handles our custom fields in Salesforce.

questions_asked.question: Can we test the platform during the eval period?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we'll provision a sandbox environment with sample data after the demo.

touches.ai_summary: Pre-demo alignment call with Savannah to ensure demo addresses key stakeholder concerns, especially Madison's focus on ROI and operational efficiency.

questions_asked.question: What matters most to Madison as the executive sponsor?
questions_asked.answer: Clear ROI, implementation timeline, and how this scales as we grow from 865 to 1500+ employees.

touches.ai_summary: Email confirmation for demo with final agenda, Zoom link, and pre-demo questionnaire responses from Savannah.

Demo conducted with Savannah showing onboarding workflow automation, Salesforce integration, and analytics dashboard. Strong engagement on automation capabilities, questions around customization limits.

questions_asked.question: How much can we customize the workflow logic without engineering support?
questions_asked.answer: Our no-code builder handles 80% of use cases. Complex conditional logic requires consulting hours.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: 6-8 weeks for your scope with consulting package - 2 weeks integration, 4-6 weeks workflow design and testing.

questions_asked.question: Which features are most valuable to you from what you've seen?
questions_asked.answer: The automated task routing and the real-time onboarding dashboard for executives.

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email with recording, ROI calculator showing $180K annual savings, and sandbox credentials for Emma's technical evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Can you include sample onboarding workflows in the sandbox?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we've pre-loaded three common onboarding patterns based on your use case.

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with preliminary pricing proposal for 27 seats on automations plus consulting tier, $28K ACV. Included implementation timeline and support SLA.

Technical evaluation session with Emma Morgan testing API integrations, data mapping, and workflow builder. Emma raised concerns about Salesforce custom object handling and asked detailed questions about data residency.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle custom objects in Salesforce that aren't standard?
questions_asked.answer: Our API mapper auto-discovers custom objects. You define the field mappings once in setup.

questions_asked.question: Where is customer data stored and can we specify region?
questions_asked.answer: US-based AWS with option for EU residency. All data encrypted at rest and in transit.

questions_asked.question: What's your API rate limit and how do you handle bulk operations?
questions_asked.answer: 10K requests/hour standard, batch endpoints for bulk. We can increase limits if needed.

questions_asked.question: Any technical blockers from your perspective?
questions_asked.answer: No blockers, but I want to test the Gainsight integration more thoroughly before we commit.

objections: Need more testing time on Gainsight integration
next_steps: Extend sandbox access for Gainsight testing

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Madison Rodriguez to present business case, ROI analysis, and implementation plan. Madison focused on competitive differentiation vs Clari and total cost of ownership.

questions_asked.question: We're also looking at Clari - what makes your onboarding automation better?
questions_asked.answer: Clari is strong on revenue forecasting but lighter on CS workflow automation. We're purpose-built for onboarding with deeper customization.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package and can we scale it down?
questions_asked.answer: 16 hours/month for workflow design and optimization. You could go platform-only but implementation would take longer.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Need to finalize by end of quarter. Evaluating budget allocation between you and Clari.

objections: Price is higher than expected, need to justify against Clari

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with detailed Clari comparison highlighting onboarding-specific features and customer case studies. Included flexible pricing options.
Negotiation call with Savannah discussing budget constraints. VectorAnalytics has $22K allocated but sees value in full solution. Discussed discount options and payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Can you work within a $22K budget?
questions_asked.answer: That's below our standard pricing for 27 seats plus consulting. Let me see what flexibility we have.

questions_asked.question: Is this a hard budget cap or is there room if we show clear ROI?
questions_asked.answer: Madison has some flexibility but we're being careful with Q2 spend. A discount would help us move forward faster.

touches.ai_summary: Executive negotiation meeting with Madison Rodriguez. Discussed revised pricing at $21.7K ACV (22.5% discount) with annual payment, implementation timeline, and success metrics. Madison wanted commitment on implementation speed.

questions_asked.question: If we sign at $22K, can you guarantee 6-week implementation?
questions_asked.answer: With your team's availability and technical readiness from Emma's eval, yes we can commit to 6 weeks.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to reduce seats mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: Annual contract is fixed seats, but we can true-up at renewal. We're flexible on seat expansion during the term.

questions_asked.question: If we meet at $21.7K with the consulting package, can you commit this quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Need to discuss with finance, but that price point makes it easier to say yes over Clari.

objections: Want flexibility on seat count reduction
next_steps: Madison to review with finance team

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with revised proposal at $21.7K ACV for 27 seats, automations plus consulting tier, 6-week implementation commitment, annual payment terms.
Final executive meeting with Madison to address contracting questions and payment terms. Madison confirmed budget approval at $21.7K and discussed kickoff timeline. Legal review in progress.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Annual upfront is built into the discounted price. Quarterly would require moving back to $24K.

questions_asked.question: What's the cancellation policy if this doesn't work out?
questions_asked.answer: Annual commitment, but we have a 90-day satisfaction guarantee where we'll work with you to make it right or refund.

questions_asked.question: Are we ready to move to contract?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, sending to legal today. Should have feedback by tomorrow.

touches.ai_summary: Pricing and terms alignment call with Savannah to finalize contract details, confirm 6-week implementation start date, and assign project team. Discussed success metrics and quarterly business reviews.

questions_asked.question: Who will be our dedicated CSM and implementation lead?
questions_asked.answer: Sarah from our CS team will be your CSM, and our implementation architect Marcus will lead the 6-week buildout.

questions_asked.question: Any final concerns before signature?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're good to go. Legal approved this morning. Madison is signing today.

next_steps: Kickoff call scheduled for next Monday
